entries.t: abbr. yaw-damping computer 偏航阻尼器计算机
abbr. [复数] yd, yds yard, yards

entries.d:
Updated Definition;\r
The origins of YDG have been discovered to be from Philip Manansala, guitarist of Of Mice & Men.
YDG means Yadig!?
> Don't get it twisted, Phil Manansala is the original, YDG?!

You deserve it.
> Dude, you fucked your girlfriend in your mom's house, and the next morning your mom imitated your gf's moans? YDI.
